name: TON Pterodactyls Birthday 2026 – Certificate of Participation
description: A token of my friend’s participation in celebrating the 4th anniversary of TON Pterodactyls on March 30, 2026, as well as my birthday on April 1, 2026. I am now 12 years old, and the TON Pterodactyls project is already 4 years old. Thank you very much for your support — this is a mark of my appreciation. P.S. This SBT was minted by me personally, and a video of the minting has been saved on YouTube.
